mapper.select: SELECT rv.id, rv.member_id, rv.product_id, rv.viewed_at, p.product_name, p.price, p.product_status FROM recent_views rv JOIN products p ON rv.product_id = p.id WHERE rv.id = #{id}

SELECT rv.id, rv.member_id, rv.product_id, rv.viewed_at, p.product_name, p.price, p.product_status FROM recent_views rv JOIN products p ON rv.product_id = p.id WHERE rv.member_id = #{memberId} AND rv.product_id = #{productId}

SELECT rv.id, rv.member_id, rv.product_id, rv.viewed_at, p.product_name, p.price, p.product_status FROM recent_views rv JOIN products p ON rv.product_id = p.id WHERE rv.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY rv.viewed_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recent_views WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recent_views (member_id, product_id, viewed_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{productId}, NOW())
